---
title: "Faculty Data Science Applications"
---

This page is a home for short data science applications contributed by university faculty. Each application can be written as a compact case study with a dataset, notebook, classroom question, and suggested extension.

## Showcase Template

::: {.feature-card}
### Application Title

**Faculty area:** Discipline or department

**Data source:** Link to dataset or public data description

**Classroom question:** A short question students can investigate

**Materials:** Notebook, worksheet, slide deck, or activity guide

**Adaptation notes:** Ideas for introductory, intermediate, and advanced learners
:::

## Coming Examples

::: {.project-list}
::: {.project-card}
### Environmental Data

Placeholder for a faculty example using environmental or climate data.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Public Health Data

Placeholder for a faculty example using health, epidemiology, or community data.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Education Data

Placeholder for a faculty example using classroom, assessment, or learning data.
:::
:::
